calendar.matters:
Petition To Establish A Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Jun-12-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Bruce Feder appearing for petitioner. Venue issue addressed. Court accepts jurisdiction. Court finds Mr. O'Roak is competent to make this determination. Matter granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition To Establish A Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Continued To Jun-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Bruce Feder appearing for petitioner. Court questions why 3600 does not apply. Counsel states that ssettlement was reached before going to court. Court can require on going supervision under 4541(b). Court wants more input from Mr. O'Roak. Matter is continued to 6/12. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
